title: ctenopteris macra
intro: Ctenopteris macra, also known as the 'tall fern', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris macra lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, treat various skin conditions, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Ctenopteris macra can be used as a tea or infused in oil for topical application, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
